title: STARGAZING
meaning_summary: STARGAZING supports ASTROWORLD's catalog value because it works as an album opener and remains tied to the project's streaming-era mythology.

earnings.assumptions: Estimate is modeled from streaming catalog demand and Travis Scott's likely performer/writer participation.

ownership.catalog_sale_status: not modeled as a fully sold song position
ownership.notes: Streaming-era album tracks can move materially as playlist visibility changes.
